speaker: Thirsty Ass
english: This here empty trough is a damn sorry sight, Comrade.

speaker: Thirsty Ass
english: It's been mighty dry these days...
dutch: t Is kurk maar dan ook kurkdroog héé,  de laatst'n tijd...

speaker: Thirsty Ass
english: Hell, everything from work to water's just gone and dried up!

speaker: Thirsty Ass
english: Can you fetch me some water with that ol' bucket, from that ol' river up there?

speaker: Thirsty Ass
english: This ol' bucket ain't gonna fill itself!

speaker: Thirsty Ass
english: Yeehaw! Use that bucket to get some water from that there river.

speaker: Thirsty Ass
english: Git that tasty water in the trough, Comrade!

speaker: Thirsty Ass
english: Yeehaw! I don't know what we'd do without you, Trusty.
dutch: Hupse! Wa' zouden we zonder'ulle doen hè, Trouwe.

speaker: Thirsty Ass
english: To be honest, I'd have gon' done it myself, but I wanna be right here when Nice Ass takes a break from her plowin'.
dutch: Eerlijk gezegd had'k het zelf willen doen, maar 'k zou graag hier zijn wanneer Schoon Beest haar pauzeke pakt.

speaker: Thirsty Ass
english: Ever since she got laid off, and replaced by that dang Tractor-Machine, it's like she's forgotten all about me.
dutch: Sinds da' z'ontslagen is, en door die Traktor-Machine vervangen is, herkent ze me precies niet meer.

speaker: Thirsty Ass
english: We never get to have casual sex anymore.

speaker: Thirsty Ass
english: What's the point in being castrated if you can't have casual sex!

speaker: Thirsty Ass
english: ... zzz... zzz...
dutch: ...zzz... zzz...

speaker: Thirsty Ass
english: It's a damn sour swallow, but yer right. We can't let Old Ass's death be in vain.
dutch: T'é nen zure dobber maar g'ebt gelijk. We kunnen Ouwe niet voor niks laten sterven, héé!

speaker: Thirsty Ass
english: *gulp*
dutch: *gulp*

speaker: Thirsty Ass
english: ...but I don't see Nice Ass nowhere...?
dutch: ...maar ik kan Schoon Beest nergens zien...?

speaker: Thirsty Ass
english: YEEEHAAWWW I'M IN!
dutch: JIE-HAAA! IK ZEN ER!

speaker: Thirsty Ass
english: They need to be reminded of how darn useful our labour truly is!
dutch: Laat ze nog maar eens beseffen hoe veel gebruik ze van ons labeur maken!

speaker: Thirsty Ass
english: They've been takin' away our livelihood, and giving us the ding dang Needle!
dutch: Ze nemen ons brood af, en in de plaats, krijgen we Spuiten!

speaker: Thirsty Ass
english: Spoken like a true Ass. YEEHAW!
dutch: Gelijk 'nen echte ezel gesproken, héé!

speaker: Thirsty Ass
english: Dang.
dutch: Amai.

speaker: Thirsty Ass
english: DAMN! The Protest is ruined!
dutch: Godverdomme! Het Protest is naar de kloten!

speaker: Thirsty Ass
english: They gave him the ding dang Needle!
dutch: Ze hebbe'n hem 't Spuitje geven, héé!

speaker: Thirsty Ass
english: I used to work 'round here in the ol' days! There's a WELL nearby!
dutch: Zég, ik herinner mij hier dat d'er hier gewoon ne PUT dichtbij is. Ik weet dat nog heel goed, ik heb hier nog gewerkt, héé!

speaker: Thirsty Ass
english: YEEHAW! I can taste it! Let's git some water and put out these dang fires!
dutch: JIE-HAAA! Ik kan het bijna proeven, sie! Kom, we gaan water halen en da' gedoe hier blussen!

speaker: Thirsty Ass
english: C'mon, git CRACKIN'!

speaker: Thirsty Ass
english: Aw shucks. There's no dang water in the damn Well!

speaker: Thirsty Ass
english: DAMN! The Protest is broken!

speaker: Thirsty Ass
english: And the others! They'll be in a mighty pickle if we don't git there in time!
dutch: En d'anderen! Ze zullen ze schoon gesjareld zijn als we daar niet op tijd zijn, héé!

speaker: Thirsty Ass
english: Nice Ass's fine legs can do that run in less than two minutes! Yeehaw!
dutch: Schoon Beest haar lange benen kunnen dadde in minder dan twee minuten! Da'k ik het ge'zeid heb, héé!

speaker: Thirsty Ass
english: It's too DAMN DRY, I'd never make it.
dutch: Da's daar véél TE DROOG. 'K geraak daar nooit!

speaker: Thirsty Ass
english: How about you, Smart?
dutch: En jij, Betweter?

speaker: Thirsty Ass
english: *oof*—Just sayin' it's a crazy idea!

speaker: Thirsty Ass
english: Now skidaddle! We gotta git rockin'!
dutch: Allez vooruit! Wij moeten nog rotsen rollen!

speaker: Thirsty Ass
english: Now skidaddle! We gotta git rockin'!
dutch: Allez vooruit! Wij moeten nog rotsen rollen!

speaker: Thirsty Ass
english: Heck, you tryin' to tell us that we don't know what we're ding dang doin' lil' Comrade?
dutch: Allez, wilt ge ons wijsmaken dat wij nie weten waar we mee bezig zijn, kleine Kameraad?

speaker: Thirsty Ass
english: Now git goin'!

speaker: Thirsty Ass
english: Go on, git!
dutch: Vooruit, wegwezen!

speaker: Thirsty Ass
english: This ain't—*oof!*—what I wanted!
dutch: Dit is—*oef!*—nie wat ik wilde!

speaker: Thirsty Ass
english: Don't tell me yer—*oof!*—thinking about leavin'?
dutch: Zeg me nie dat ge—*oef!*—van plan zijt om weg te gaan?

speaker: Thirsty Ass
english: Just because yer wantin' more in life don't mean you got to abandon yer home!
dutch: Omdat ge meer wilt in ’t leven, wilt da nog nie zeggen dat ge uw thuis moet achterlaten!

speaker: Thirsty Ass
english: I'm dreaming of setting up a darn special place right here in Fannyside where Asses can get a drink and let loose.
dutch: Ik droom ervan om hier in Muilegem een caféke te maken waar Ezels kunnen drinken en ontspannen.

speaker: Thirsty Ass
english: It'd have all kinds of tasty water.
dutch: Er zou van alles zijn aan lekker water.

speaker: Thirsty Ass
english: Rain water. River water. Pond water.
dutch: Regenwater. Rivierwater. Plaswater.

speaker: Thirsty Ass
english: I’d call it... Bottoms Up!
dutch: Ik zou ’t noemen… Poepegaatje!

speaker: Thirsty Ass
english: No... *oof!*—I guess not.
dutch: Nee... *oef!*—Waarschijnlijk nie.

speaker: Thirsty Ass
english: Can I git ya some water, Comrade?
dutch: Moe'j wat water hebben, Kameraad?

speaker: Thirsty Ass
english: Heck, yer not lookin' so hot.

english: You look like you could use some water too!

english: Dangnabbit! I'm goin' stir crazy down here!

english: Ah heck...

english: Nice Ass what are you going to do?

speaker: Thirsty Ass
english: Then heck, I’m staying too!

english: Heck, I know we ain't seein' eye to eye, but I'm gonna miss y'all...

speaker: Thirsty Ass
english: You just standin' there to make me cry more are ya? Git goin'!
dutch: Sta je daar nu gewoon te staan om mij meer te doen bleiten? Maakt dat je weg bent, héé!

speaker: Thirsty Ass
english: Heck, I don't have a drop of respect left for you.

english: Comrade Sturdy! Hell, you look parched!

english: Mosey on over and take a sip of my new drink special: The Pail Ale!

english: Tonight, The Bottoms Up Bar is finally openin'!

english: Always been my darn DREAM to have a place for us Asses to take a break and share some good 'ol water.

english: What's gettin' ya down, Comrade?

english: But hey at least she's keepin' outta trouble.

english: Well heck Comrade, that's exactly why I'm openin' my BAR!

speaker: Thirsty Ass
english: Say, if yer lookin' for a distraction...

english: I think this here bar is missin' the somethin' special that makes it worth comin' to.

english: Maybe you can do somethin' with this ol' bucket... It's got a hole in it.

english: What's that there contraption called?

speaker: Thirsty Ass
english: YEEHAW! What a BEAUT!!

english: I'm sure that'll attract everyone to my bar!

english: Oh!

english: SAD ASS! I got a pail with yer name on it!

english: A GODDAMN PARTY!

english: Slow Ass?! What the heck are you wearin'?

english: Spit it out and don't omit nothin'!

english: But it'll take forever to git there... we don't all have well-toned legs.

speaker: Thirsty Ass

english: YEEEHAW! Time to get crackin'!

speaker: Thirsty Ass
english: Kick Ass?!

english: Kick Ass!!

english: Dang...

english: What a sight for sore eyes—if it ain't Kick Ass!

english: We came to git you Comrade.

english: What matters most, is that we stick together.

speaker: Thirsty Ass
english: Plus, I need more customers! I finally opened The Bottom's Up Ba—
dutch: Plus, 'k heb meer klanten nodig héé! 'k Heb eindelijk het Poepegaatje geopend, dat ca—

english: Let's git goin'!

english: Yeehaw! We're all here!

speaker: Thirsty Ass
english: Yeehaw! We're gonna be a Herd again!

speaker: Thirsty Ass
english: How the hell are we gonna make it back to our Farm without the ding dang Tractor-Machine?

speaker: Thirsty Ass
english: But Nice Ass, this ain't our fight!

english: But Big Ass, this ain't our fight!

english: Nice Ass—?! Wait!
